title: Full-stack Next.js App on Cloudflare Pages
description: Build and deploy a complete Next.js application to Cloudflare Pages with edge-compatible auth, database, caching, and CI.

steps.description: Bootstrap a Next.js App Router project with TypeScript
Add Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Set up Drizzle ORM — use the D1 HTTP driver for Cloudflare edge compatibility
Add Clerk authentication — Clerk's Edge middleware is fully compatible with Cloudflare Pages
Add Upstash Redis for rate limiting and caching — HTTP-based, works on the Edge
Instrument error monitoring before going live
CI pipeline: type-check and build on every push
Deploy to Cloudflare Pages via Wrangler — set env vars in the Pages dashboard
